"'''Sunny Side of Ryloth'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by the [[Band/Legends|band]] [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]]. The song title referenced<ref name="GG9" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The composition was included on the band's compilation album ''[[Thoughts from the Core]]'', available in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="GG9" /> between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> Red Shift Limit was deemed to be an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] band by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]], who banned the track.<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Sunny Side of Ryloth" was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[1993]] reference book for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]].<ref name="GG9" />

According to early portrayals in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, Ryloth was a tide-locked planet, a phenomenon that resulted in [[Bright Lands|one side]] of the planet always facing the [[Ryloth (star)/Legends|sun]], therefore being the "sunny side."<ref name="SWSB">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref> However, this information has since been overridden by more recent sources.<ref name="Atlas" /><ref name="TCW">{{TCW|Storm Over Ryloth}}</ref>
